summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 new features: (1) Monaco code editor for coding quizzes, (2) College ID auto-capitalize on login, (3) Icon/text overlap fix on login, (4) Analytics page split into Quiz/Semester tabs. All backend tests passed (14/14). All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint returns 200
Backend: Student login (22WJ8A6745/student123) returns 200 with access token
Backend: Login auto-capitalize works (backend accepts lowercase college ID)
Backend: Invalid login returns 401
Backend: Python code execution works (print Hello World)
Backend: Python factorial function executes correctly (returns 120)
Backend: JavaScript code execution works (console.log)
Backend: JavaScript fibonacci function executes correctly (returns 55)
Backend: Unsupported language returns 400
Backend: Code execution requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Quiz listing returns 3 quizzes including Python Coding Challenge
Backend: Coding quiz has coding questions with language and starter_code
Backend: Student analytics endpoint returns quiz and semester data
Backend: Student dashboard returns active quizzes and CGPA
Frontend: Login page loads correctly
Frontend: College ID input auto-capitalizes (typed lowercase -> displayed UPPERCASE)
Frontend: College ID input has pl-12 padding (prevents icon overlap)
Frontend: Password input has pl-12 padding (prevents icon overlap)
Frontend: Login with valid credentials navigates to Student Dashboard
Frontend: Student Dashboard shows 3 available quizzes
Frontend: Python Coding Challenge quiz visible on dashboard
Frontend: Analytics page has Quiz Analytics and Semester Analytics tabs
Frontend: Quiz Analytics tab shows performance charts (trend, subject comparison, radar, pie)
Frontend: Semester Analytics tab shows SGPA/CGPA trend and semester details
Frontend: Tab switching works correctly between Quiz and Semester analytics
Frontend: Monaco editor renders in coding quiz
Frontend: Run Code button visible and clickable
Frontend: Code execution output displayed in OUTPUT section
seed_data_creation: 3 quizzes seeded including Python Coding Challenge with 3 coding questions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 requested features are working: (1) Monaco editor renders for coding questions in Python Coding Challenge quiz, (2) College ID auto-capitalizes on login page, (3) Login inputs have pl-12 padding preventing icon overlap, (4) Analytics page has Quiz/Semester tabs with different content. Backend code execution supports Python and JavaScript. The coding quiz is the 3rd quiz titled 'Python Coding Challenge' with 3 coding questions.

monaco_editor.details: Monaco editor renders with dark theme, syntax highlighting, line numbers. Run Code button executes code and displays output.

college_id_auto_capitalize.details: Frontend uses toUpperCase() on input change. Backend also accepts lowercase and converts to uppercase.

icon_text_overlap_fix.details: Both College ID and Password inputs have pl-12 class providing left padding for icons.

analytics_tabs.details: Quiz Analytics tab shows performance trend, subject comparison, skills radar, question type accuracy. Semester Analytics tab shows SGPA/CGPA trend, semester-wise SGPA bar chart, and semester detail tables with grades.
